name: transcoder-pipeline
description: Host-side automation for media libraries: transcode originals to web-optimised .web.mp4 (ffmpeg + VLC fallback), organise flat downloads into per-profile folders, archive expired stories.

envVars.name: ELITE_STORE_ROOT
envVars.description: Root path under which shortvideos/, shorts18/ and tiktok/ live

postInstall: 1. Install ffmpeg, vlc and python3 on the host
2. Create the service user/group used in the systemd units (default: elite)
4. Install python scripts: sudo install -m 0755 bin/*.py /opt/elite/bin/
5. Install unit files: sudo cp systemd/* /etc/systemd/system/ && sudo systemctl daemon-reload
6. Enable timers + path watchers: sudo systemctl enable --now elite-transcode.timer elite-trigger-*.path
7. Create the trigger dir: sudo install -d -o elite -g elite /var/lib/elite-triggers
